title: Unknown mod
description: A mod that provides a couple of items and blocks to show in footages for your videos to hide the actual item you are narrating to keep the intrigue going.
body:
A mod that provides a couple of items and blocks to show in footages for your videos to hide the actual item you are narrating to keep the intrigue going. Inspired by the video of a minecraft YouTube Shorts maker who made the video "Guess the block/item/mob in 60 seconds" (don't know his name).

### Roadmap

- ~~Items~~
- ~~Blocks~~
- Mobs
